query: bash -c "source ~/hermes-venv/bin/activate && export HERMES_HOME=/home/yz01/.hermes-nanobot && hermes gateway run --replace 2>&1 &"; sleep 8; echo ===NANOBOT_STATE===; cat /home/yz01/.hermes-nanobot/gateway_state.json 2>/dev/null; echo ===HERMES_STATE===; cat /home/yz01/.hermes/gateway_state.json 2>/dev/null; echo ===PROCS===; ps aux | grep \"hermes gateway\" | grep -v grep
